versions.title: The Agent Loop
versions.subtitle: Bash is All You Need
versions.keyInsight: The minimal agent kernel is a while loop + one tool

versions.title: Tools
versions.subtitle: One Handler Per Tool
versions.keyInsight: The loop stays the same; new tools register into the dispatch map

versions.title: TodoWrite
versions.subtitle: Plan Before You Act
versions.keyInsight: An agent without a plan drifts; list the steps first, then execute

versions.title: Subagents
versions.subtitle: Clean Context Per Subtask
versions.keyInsight: Subagents use independent messages[], keeping the main conversation clean

versions.title: Skills
versions.subtitle: Load on Demand
versions.keyInsight: Inject knowledge via tool_result when needed, not upfront in the system prompt

versions.title: Compact
versions.subtitle: Three-Layer Compression
versions.keyInsight: Context will fill up; three-layer compression strategy enables infinite sessions

versions.title: Tasks
versions.subtitle: Task Graph + Dependencies
versions.coreAddition: TaskManager with file-based state + dependency graph
versions.keyInsight: A file-based task graph with ordering, parallelism, and dependencies -- the coordination backbone for multi-agent work

versions.title: Background Tasks
versions.subtitle: Background Threads + Notifications
versions.keyInsight: Run slow operations in the background; the agent keeps thinking ahead

versions.title: Agent Teams
versions.subtitle: Teammates + Mailboxes
versions.keyInsight: When one agent can't finish, delegate to persistent teammates via async mailboxes

versions.title: Team Protocols
versions.subtitle: Shared Communication Rules
versions.keyInsight: One request-response pattern drives all team negotiation

versions.title: Autonomous Agents
versions.subtitle: Scan Board, Claim Tasks
versions.keyInsight: Teammates scan the board and claim tasks themselves; no need for the lead to assign each one

versions.title: Worktree + Task Isolation
versions.subtitle: Isolate by Directory
versions.coreAddition: Composable worktree lifecycle + event stream over a shared task board
versions.keyInsight: Each works in its own directory; tasks manage goals, worktrees manage directories, bound by ID

versions.title: Background Tasks
versions.subtitle: Slow Operations Go to the Background
versions.keyInsight: The agent can keep reasoning while slow work completes elsewhere.

versions.title: Cron Scheduler
versions.subtitle: Producing Work on a Schedule
versions.keyInsight: Recurring work should be created by the harness, not remembered by the model.

versions.title: Agent Teams
versions.subtitle: One Agent Isn't Enough
versions.keyInsight: Large work can be split across persistent teammates that communicate through inboxes.

functions.name: spawnTeammateThread
functions.signature: spawnTeammateThread(name: string, role: string, prompt: string)

versions.title: Team Protocols
versions.subtitle: Teammates Need Agreements
versions.keyInsight: Request-response protocols turn loose messages into traceable coordination.

functions.name: matchResponse
functions.signature: matchResponse(responseType: ProtocolType, requestId: string, approve: boolean)
